intent: Follow up after a client meeting
facts:
- Met on Monday
- Client is Priya Mehta
- Discussed 50-seat software license
- Next step is a technical demo
reference_email:
Dear Priya,

Thank you for meeting with us on Monday. It was a pleasure discussing how our software can support your team with the 50-seat license.

As agreed, the next step is to schedule a technical demo at your convenience. Please let me know your availability and we will arrange everything.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
[Name]

facts:
- Deadline is this Friday
- Budget needed: $15,000
- Project will stall without approval
- Decision maker is CFO James Reed
reference_email:
Dear James,

I am writing to request your urgent approval for a $15,000 budget allocation. Without this approval by Friday, the project will come to a halt, causing significant delays.

I understand your time is valuable and appreciate your prompt attention to this matter. Please let me know if you need any additional information to facilitate this decision.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
[Name]

facts:
- Deadline was yesterday
- Reason: unexpected technical issue
- New delivery date: Thursday
- Client is Mark Stevens
reference_email:
Dear Mark,

I sincerely apologize for missing yesterday's deadline. An unexpected technical issue arose that required immediate attention and caused an unavoidable delay.

I want to assure you that the work is well underway and I will deliver everything by Thursday without fail. I take full responsibility and appreciate your patience.

Thank you for your understanding.

Sincerely,
[Name]

facts:
- Applying for MBA program at Stanford
- Application deadline is December 1st
- Professor is Dr. Linda Park
- Worked together on AI research project
reference_email:
Dear Dr. Park,

I hope this message finds you well. I am applying to the MBA program at Stanford with a deadline of December 1st and would be deeply honored if you would consider writing a letter of recommendation on my behalf.

Our collaboration on the AI research project was one of the most formative experiences of my academic career, and I believe your perspective would add great value to my application.

Please let me know if you are available and if you need any supporting materials from me.

With gratitude,
[Name]

intent: Introduce a new product to a potential client
facts:
- Product: AI-powered analytics dashboard
- Key benefit: reduces reporting time by 60%
- Free trial available for 30 days
- Contact is Sarah Johnson, Head of Operations
reference_email:
Dear Sarah,

I hope you are doing well! I am excited to introduce our AI-powered analytics dashboard, a tool specifically designed to transform how operations teams work.

Our clients consistently report a 60% reduction in reporting time after adoption. We are currently offering a free 30-day trial with no commitment required — an ideal way to experience the value firsthand.

I would love to set up a quick call to walk you through the platform. Would you have 20 minutes this week?

Warm regards,
[Name]

facts:
- Meeting is scheduled for Wednesday 3pm
- Already have a conflict
- Want to propose Thursday instead
- Sender is colleague Raj Patel
reference_email:
Hi Raj,

Thank you for the meeting invitation. Unfortunately I have a prior commitment on Wednesday at 3pm and will not be able to join.

Would Thursday work for you instead? I am flexible on timing and happy to adjust to whatever suits you best.

Apologies for any inconvenience and looking forward to connecting soon.

Best,
[Name]

intent: Send a project status update to stakeholders
facts:
- Project is 70% complete
- On track for June 15 delivery
- Completed: design and development phases
- Remaining: testing and deployment
reference_email:
Dear Team,

I am pleased to share that the project is progressing well and is currently 70% complete, keeping us firmly on track for our June 15 delivery date.

The design and development phases have been successfully completed. We are now moving into testing and deployment, which we expect to wrap up on schedule.

I will share another update next week. Please reach out if you have any questions in the meantime.

Best regards,
[Name]

intent: Negotiate a better pricing deal with a vendor
facts:
- Current contract is $8,000/month
- Competitor offers same service for $6,000
- Been a client for 3 years
- Want to renew for another 2 years if price is right
reference_email:
Dear [Vendor Name],

As we approach our contract renewal, I wanted to open a conversation about pricing. We have been a loyal client for three years and are keen to continue that partnership for another two years.

However, we have recently received a competing offer for the same service at $6,000 per month, compared to our current $8,000. We would prefer to stay with you given our strong working relationship, but we need the numbers to align.

Could we schedule a call this week to discuss options?

Best regards,
[Name]

facts:
- New hire is Ayesha Khan
- Joining as Data Analyst
- Start date is Monday
- Team uses Slack and Jira for collaboration
reference_email:
Dear Ayesha,

Welcome to the team! We are absolutely thrilled to have you joining us as our new Data Analyst starting Monday.

You will find our team collaborative and supportive. We primarily use Slack for day-to-day communication and Jira for project tracking — both are easy to get started with and the team will help you get set up.

Do not hesitate to reach out with any questions before your first day. We cannot wait to have you on board!

Warm regards,
[Name]

intent: Request feedback on a submitted proposal
facts:
- Proposal was submitted last Tuesday
- No response received yet
- Proposal is for a 6-month consulting engagement
- Recipient is Director of Strategy, Tom Bailey
reference_email:
Dear Tom,

I hope you are having a great week. I wanted to follow up on the proposal I submitted last Tuesday regarding the 6-month consulting engagement.

I understand you have a busy schedule and I do not wish to rush your review. That said, I would appreciate any initial thoughts or feedback when you have a moment, as it will help me refine the proposal if needed.

Thank you for your time and consideration.

Best regards,
[Name]
